message.content:
Test file: src/claim-office.spec.ts
Failing test: "payout of 350.5G rounds DOWN to 350G (in MHPCO's favor)"
Expected: { payout: 350, remainingCap: 1650 }
Current error: payout 350.5 received
Implementation file: src/claim-office.ts

Note: Wrap the final payout in Math.floor. RemainingCap should be cap minus the FLOORED payout (so 2000 - 350 = 1650).

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text: I'll analyze the failing test and implement the minimal change to make it pass.
Now I'll make the minimal change - wrap the payout in Math.floor.

input.old_string:
const payout = Math.min(rawPayout, cap);
  return { payout, remainingCap: cap - payout };
input.new_string:
const payout = Math.floor(Math.min(rawPayout, cap));
  return { payout, remainingCap: cap - payout };

content.text:
All 38 tests pass.
